n: Mission: The Further Adventures of Elladan & Elrohir, Chapter 2

steps.t: You and Elrohir have found a dead boar next to a set of large footprints. You should examine the footprints.
You should talk to Elrohir to see what he's discovered.
Whatever creature created these footprints may be dangerous. You should follow Elrohir and help him track it down.
The drake matron has been defeated. You should talk to Elrohir.
You and Elrohir have returned to Pembar to find Elladan waiting with the Great Eagle Gwaihir. You should talk to Gwaihir.
